promptPreview.title: Active system prompt
promptPreview.description: The exact prompt that would be sent to the SDK for {{agentType}}. No tokens spent — this is reconstructed locally from the same code path as create_client.

restartDialog.title: Restart agent
restartDialog.description: Pick the smallest restart that covers your problem.

qa.title: Restart QA only
qa.description: Re-run the reviewer + fixer against the current implementation. Cheap and safe.

coder.title: Restart coder
coder.description: Re-run the coder from the first non-completed subtask. Earlier work is preserved.

full.title: Restart full build
full.description: Discard the current plan and start over. Most expensive — equivalent to a fresh build.
